raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Occupational Safety & Health Standards Board announced the creation of stronger rules for employers to protect employees against COVID-19.",
    "The decision to strengthen protections will significantly benefit high-risk populations such as immigrant, low-income, or minority workers.",
    "The petition submitted by Worksafe advocated for emergency actions to tackle COVID-19 in workplaces.",
    "California agricultural workers are contracting COVID-19 at staggering rates, with 93 percent of confirmed cases in Monterey County being ag workers.",
    "The California Farmworkers COVID-19 Package is described as a first-in-the-nation bill package aimed at protecting the health and safety of agricultural workers."
  ]
}
```
